title: City lawmakers urge mayor to fight for taxing Syracuse University student center
summary: City lawmakers are pressuring Mayor Sharon Owens to appeal a court ruling that prohibits Syracuse from collecting property taxes on part of Syracuse University's main student center. The administration is still deliberating whether to pursue an appeal of the decision, raising questions about tax revenue recovery and the city's relationship with the university.

political_signal.description: City council members are advocating for executive action (appeal) on a tax revenue matter involving a major institutional stakeholder, signaling internal pressure on the mayor's administration regarding property tax collection authority and budget priorities.
